name: cs-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for web testing and document generation

plugins.name: playwright-test
plugins.description: 5 specialized agents for comprehensive web app testing

plugins.name: playwright-test-v2
plugins.description: AI Agent Teams powered intelligent web testing with 6 Claude agents

plugins.name: tdd-clean-planner
plugins.description: TDD + Clean Architecture 기반 코딩 플랜 자동 생성 - 4개 전문 에이전트가 도메인 분석, 아키텍처 설계, 테스트 전략, 구현 체크리스트를 병렬로 생성

plugins.name: playwright-test-v3
plugins.description: 7-agent AI Teams web testing with social share (KakaoTalk/SNS) validation and PWA verification

plugins.name: playwright-test-v4
plugins.description: 9-agent AI Teams web testing with build/deploy pre-validation and DB CRUD verification

plugins.name: playwright-test-v5
plugins.description: 11-agent AI Teams web testing with touch interaction validation and image optimization (MWC 2026 learnings)

plugins.name: convo-maker
plugins.description: 세션 Q&A를 자연스러운 미국식 영어 대화로 변환 - Convert session Q&A into natural American English conversations for language learning
